productDisplayName: Peter England Men Classic Black Belt
description: An all-time favourite accessory, belts form an integral part of dressing. This signature leather belt from peter england is set to pump up your style and add zing to your attire. Length: 38 inches Made of leather with a Crocodile effect for absolute durability, comfort and style Stylish tang clasp and holes to customise Fit Brand name embossed on the tail Care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Use a leather conditioner to maintain belt quality if necessary
